bead.title: Provider status must consume Fizeau status DTOs directly
bead.description: DDx provider/status surfaces still translate Fizeau HarnessInfo/ProviderInfo into DDx-local RoutingSignalSnapshot/read-model fields in cli/internal/server/providers.go and cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go. That keeps provider quota, auth, freshness, usage, cost class, request-fit, and default-model interpretation in DDx instead of treating Fizeau as the routing/status authority. Replace DDx-local signal derivation with direct consumption of Fizeau public status DTOs, or add the missing DTO fields upstream first and then consume them. In-scope files: cli/internal/server/providers.go, cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go, frontend/provider GraphQL models if field shape changes, tests. Out-of-scope: changing routing decisions or provider probing behavior inside Fizeau.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/server/providers.go no longer has signalFromHarnessInfo, providerQuotaHeadroomStr, providerAuthStateStr, harnessDefaultModels, harnessCosCostClassStr, or DDx-local default-model guesses for Fizeau providers. 2. cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go no longer reconstructs provider quota/auth/cost semantics from HarnessInfo when equivalent Fizeau DTO fields exist. 3. Any missing Fizeau field required by the UI is tracked upstream, not reimplemented in DDx. 4. Provider UI/API tests assert fields come from Fizeau ProviderInfo/HarnessInfo DTO values, not DDx heuristics. 5. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/... passes.

events.body: `go test ./internal/server/...` passes, but `go test ./cmd/...` is red for preexisting command-package issues unrelated to the provider-status refactor. The failures include `TestReviewEvidenceApproveAttributesToTier` in `cmd/agent_metrics_review_evidence_test.go`, install/verification tests in `cmd/installation_acceptance_test.go` that expect a runnable build artifact, and `TestRoutinglintNonStatusFilesDoNotCallResolveRoute` in `cmd/routinglint_test.go` complaining about `agent_route_status.go`. Those failures block satisfying the bead's required `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...` gate without changing out-of-scope command-package files.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
